_doc: CANONICAL CONFIG — single source of truth for rule values. Drift between this file and any prompt/code is a kill-switch event (premarket Step 1a enforces). When you change a value here, also change the embedded constant in the prompt that uses it (heartbeat.md, simulator_real.py, etc.). The pin check verifies they match next premarket.
rule_version_v15_3_notes: v15.3 LIVE 2026-06-01 per J authorization ('we need to add what we learned over the weekend, last engine didn't perform well, it needs updated'). Adds RIBBON CONVICTION GATE — three pre-entry checks that encode what J visually checks before entering: (A) ribbon spreading >=5c/3bars, (B) ribbon fresh <=15 bars, (C) no midday single-trendline. Source: 16-month real-fills IS/OOS: OOS WR 0.77 +28.3/c WF 4.29 (all 12 threshold combos WR>=0.71 = robust plateau). Anchor: 5/6 PASS (5/04 kept +53.6/c). Combined with V14E exits: OOS WR 0.73. Revert: set min_ribbon_momentum_cents=0, max_ribbon_duration_bars=999, midday_trendline_gate=false. Inherits all v15.2 doctrine.
rule_version_v15_2_notes: v15.2 LIVE 2026-05-18 evening per J ratification ('Lets do option A, B, and D'). Adds Step 0a (numeric alert context read) to BOTH heartbeats. No filter changes; alert is corroboration not authorization. Pipeline: numeric_pulse fires every 15s during RTH (pure Python, $0 cost), writes alerts to numeric-alert.jsonl when (conf>=0.65 + contra-trend + level-proximate). Heartbeat now reads last-60s alerts as ATTENTION cue. Same tick still applies all 11 filters. Companion change: fast_path_executor live-mode enabled via automation/state/fast-path-live-enabled.flag sentinel (J ratified). Inherits all v15.1 doctrine (entry window 09:35-15:00 ET continuous, 15:00 cutoff, closed-bar R1 filter, per-tier strike, etc.). Revert: edit this file rule_version to 'v15.1' + revert heartbeat.md RULE_VERSION constants + remove Step 0a sections + delete fast-path-live-enabled.flag.
rule_version_notes: v15.1 LIVE 2026-05-14 evening per J authorization ('any time between 9:35 - and 3pm is fair game for ENTRIES. theta will kill us after 3. we must exit before EOD'). Two doctrine changes from v15: (a) 14:00-15:00 ET no_trade_window REMOVED — entry window now CONTINUOUS [09:35, 15:00) ET; (b) entry cutoff hardened from 15:50 → 15:00 ET (theta protection); (c) R1 closed-bar fix shipped in heartbeat.md SPY 5m read — count=2 → count=3 + bar_close_et<=now_et filter to discard TV's in-progress bar at index [-1]. Existing positions still flatten by 15:50 ET hard time stop (Gamma_EodFlatten safety net at 15:55 ET unchanged). Sources: docs/HEARTBEAT-CHART-DATA-AUDIT-2026-05-14.md, docs/R4-HEARTBEAT-MISALIGNMENT-2026-05-14.md (5 of 46 ticks today MISALIGNED-CRITICAL), docs/T48-FOLLOWUP-FIRE-EVENING-2026-05-14.md. Inherits all v15 v14_enhanced doctrine (per-tier strike, -20% stop, trailing PL chandelier, tp1 0.50, runner 2.50, max-premium hard gate).
rule_version_revert_command: To revert v15.1 → v15: (1) edit this file rule_version 'v15.1' → 'v15' and rule_version_ratified_at '2026-05-14' → '2026-05-13', (2) edit automation/prompts/heartbeat.md RULE_VERSION='v15.1' → 'v15' AND restore the 14:00-15:00 no_trade_window text on lines 308 + 329, (3) edit automation/prompts/premarket.md RULE_VERSION_EXPECTED='v15.1' → 'v15'. To revert further v15 → v14: cp automation/prompts/heartbeat-v14-prod-backup.md automation/prompts/heartbeat.md and update both pin files to 'v14'.
_heartbeat_section: Per-tick parameters consumed by automation/prompts/heartbeat.md and backtest/lib/{filters,orchestrator,simulator_real}.py. Operating principle 4: drift = sync immediately.
_exits_section: v15 (RECONCILED 2026-06-14, C3/L77): asymmetric premium stops — bear -20% (premium_stop_pct_bear), bull/generic -8% (premium_stop_pct). TP1 = chart-level OR +30% premium fallback, 50% off at TP1. After TP1: runner stop to breakeven, runner target 2.5x. Was stale at v14 (tp1 0.667 / runner 3.0 / no bear field) while heartbeat.md + j_edge_tracker.py already used v15 — reconciled to remove the drift.
_entry_section: v15.1 (LIVE 2026-05-14 evening): entries [09:35, 15:00) ET continuous. 14:00-15:00 mid-day blackout REMOVED per J. Existing positions still flatten by 15:50 ET hard time stop. v11/v12 trigger asymmetry preserved (bear ≥1, bull ≥2). Filter 9 vol_mult 0.7× (catches morning rejection bars).
_entry_no_trade_window_et_history: v11→v15 had 14:00-15:00 ET mid-day blackout. v15.1 (2026-05-14 evening per J): REMOVED — entry window now CONTINUOUS [09:35, 15:00) ET. Theta is the problem after 3pm, not mid-day. Mid-day blackout was leaving setups on the table.
_vix_section: Two distinct VIX threshold ladders. (a) iv_regime bands (LOW/MID/HIGH) used by premarket for context tagging. (b) entry_thresholds used by heartbeat filters 8a/8b. Cache refresh logic in heartbeat refreshes when value within ±0.20 of any entry_threshold.
_sizing_section: v13b quality-tiered. ELITE = trigger set includes confluence OR sequence_rejection/reclaim. BASE = otherwise. $0-$2k tier skips quality scaling (capital constraint).

position_sizing_tiers.structure: 2 TP1 + 1 conservative runner (no upsize — capital constraint)

_ribbon_conviction_gate_section: v15.3 RIBBON CONVICTION GATE fields — consumed by heartbeat.md and backtest/lib/orchestrator.py. Added 2026-06-01 per J ratification. Source: 16-month IS/OOS WR 0.77 +28.3/c WF 4.29. All 12 threshold combos WR>=0.71. Anchor PASS.
_min_ribbon_momentum_cents_doc: Gate A: ribbon spread must have widened >= this many cents over the last 3 bars. 5c = EMAs actively separating (trend accelerating). < 5c = skip (ribbon compressing or flat = chop). Revert: set 0 to disable.
_max_ribbon_duration_bars_doc: Gate B: ribbon must have been stacked in current direction for <= this many bars. 15 bars = 75 min max. Fresh flip = edge; stale 2-hour trend = exhaustion risk. Revert: set 999 to disable.
_midday_trendline_gate_doc: Gate C: if true, block entries where ONLY trigger is trendline_rejection and time is 11:30-14:00 ET. Single-trigger midday trendline = -8.6/trade historically (307 OOS trades). Revert: set false to disable.
_v15_pending_section: v15 fields LIVE 2026-05-13 evening (was STAGED earlier in the day; rule_version flipped from v14 to v15 per J authorization 'v15 can go live that is chill lets let er rip'). Heartbeat NOW consumes these via the per-tier strike + max-premium hard gate added under the v15 ratification doctrine. Backup at automation/prompts/heartbeat-v14-prod-backup.md preserves v14 byte-for-byte. Revert command in rule_version_revert_command. Doctrine change: docs/DOCTRINE-CHANGE-2026-05-13-EVENING.md + docs/V15-ACTIVATION-2026-05-13.md.
_v15_data_source: analysis/recommendations/trade-5-13-variants.json (4,410 combos on 5/13 11:38 bullish reclaim signal). Top combo for J's $1K-account style: 742C × 3 @ $0.19 = $57 cost → +$218 (+383%) per OTM-3 + qty=3 + no-PL pattern.

v15_strike_offset_per_tier.label: OTM-3 (J style — lean + leveraged)
v15_strike_offset_per_tier.rationale: 742C @ $0.19 type entries. Buy under $100, sell over $100. Big-multiple gains on directional moves.

v15_strike_offset_per_tier.label: OTM-2
v15_strike_offset_per_tier.rationale: Balanced: enough premium to absorb noise, cheap enough to compound.

v15_strike_offset_per_tier.label: OTM-1 / ATM
v15_strike_offset_per_tier.rationale: Wider strikes start consuming returns; bias slightly OTM.

v15_strike_offset_per_tier.label: ITM-2 (current v14)
v15_strike_offset_per_tier.rationale: Production v14 default. Higher delta, smoother P&L curve. Capital available.

v15_max_premium_pct_of_account.rationale: 1K account: max $400 per trade (4 strikes worth at qty=3). Forces OTM bias even if v14 chooses ITM-2.

v15_hard_gate_logic: If (qty × premium × 100) > (account_equity × max_pct), reduce qty or skip OTM until fits. Prevents 315%-leverage situations like the actual 5/13 trade if account were $1K (15× $2.10 = $3,150 = 315% of $1K).
v15_profit_lock_decision_data: T50 trailing-PL test 2026-05-13 22:16 ET: B1 trailing 20% wins aggregate ($36,621 vs fixed $36,450 = +0.5%) with LOWER concentration (top5 32% vs 37.1%). On 5/13 738C trade hypothetical: trailing 20% rides to ~$4.34 (~+107% vs fixed PL caps at $2.23 = +6%, vs no-PL actual $5.43 = +159%). Trailing 20% = best balance of big-day upside + chop-day protection. See analysis/recommendations/v14_enhanced-pl-variants.json.
v15_ratification_status: LIVE 2026-05-13 evening — heartbeat.md updated, rule_version flipped to v15. Production heartbeat now consumes per-tier strike + per-tier max_premium_pct + trailing profit-lock + 09:35 entry gate + -20% bear stop + tp1 0.50 + runner 2.50. v14 preserved at heartbeat-v14-prod-backup.md. Revert command in rule_version_revert_command.
_risk_section: Hard caps from risk-rules.md. Daily kill switch + per-trade risk. By construction one max-loss = day done.
_first_entry_rule_section: Added 2026-05-08. If a setup name has been entered AND stopped out today, no second entry on that setup name today. Was in risk-rules.md doctrine, not in heartbeat code. Now both (sync).
_macro_section: Macro Bias Inheritance v2 — HARD VETO if event ≤ 120 min ahead AND counter-trend to today-bias.bias. SOFT MODIFIER 120-240 min raises bull threshold to ≥10/11, lowers bear to ≥7/10.
_calendar_freshness_section: Premarket Step 1b checks macro-calendar.json#refresh_log[] last entry. > 7 days = stale, surface as journal warning. Sunday weekly-review owns the actual 30-day fetch.
_liquidity_gate_section: Pre-entry liquidity check on candidate strike. Hard rejections per risk-rules.md.
_catalyst_section: Catalyst-awareness flags. Set true to graduate from journal-only to filter-active. Default: aware-only.
_dealer_section: Options dealer levels are written to key-levels.json as Liquidity tier; heartbeat treats them like any other level (price, distance) — no special dealer-aware logic. Set true to start tagging dealer-level interactions in journal.
_liquidity_tier_section: Volume Profile / AVWAP shelves are added to key-levels.json by premarket. Heartbeat treats them like any other level. No flag needed — Pine indicator availability is the only gate.
_dark_pool_section: EOD aggregates yesterday's TRF block prints into Liquidity tier for tomorrow. Set false to disable the EOD step (e.g., if Alpaca rate-limits trade pulls).
_session_timing_section: Task Scheduler trigger times. Used by automation/morning-kickoff.md and setup/install-tasks.ps1.
_resilience_section: Self-healing harness invariants. Kept here for visibility — actual values are also embedded in _shared.ps1 (drift between the two = bug to fix).
